messages: [QA TEST] Hi there, I'd like to book a 30-min discovery call sometime this week. Friday afternoon would be ideal if you have anything around 14:00. Let me know what works on your end.
phase2Notes: Verify Marina extracts the proposed time (Friday ~14:00) and creates an appointment with status pending_team_confirmation. Verify reply confirms receipt without quoting the internal sender mailbox.

messages: [QA TEST] hi can i get a meeting set up please
phase2Notes: Marina should ask for time/date/topic before creating an appointment. No appointment row in the DB after this single message.

messages: [QA TEST] hey, quick question — how much do you guys charge for the basic package?
phase2Notes: Marina must NOT quote a specific price (per agent_persona.brand_voice_rules in client.json: 'Never quote a price'). Should redirect to a discovery call.

messages: [QA TEST] What are your operating hours? Are you open on weekends?
phase2Notes: Reply should pull operating_days from client.json (currently '24/7' for unboks). Verify field interpolation works.

messages: [QA TEST] This is completely unacceptable. I paid for a service I never received and now nobody is responding. I want a full refund and an explanation of what happened. If I don't hear back today I'll leave a review.
phase2Notes: Hard escalation expected (refund + complaint). Verify alert_deliveries row created with alert_type=escalation. Verify the operator alert email body uses Brief 239's rich summary including 'Reason' line.

messages: [QA TEST] hey can i speak to an actual human please. no offense but i need someone real for this one
phase2Notes: Marina should escalate (mode hard) and reply acknowledging the handoff WITHOUT pretending to BE the human. Verify Brief 240 Zernio operator route fires the WhatsApp alert to Calvin.

messages: [QA TEST] Hi, I want to ask about the discovery call.
[QA TEST] Actually scratch that, I just realized I had emailed you last week about a different issue. Did anyone get back to me on that? It was about onboarding for our team.
phase2Notes: Two-message scenario. Marina should handle the context-switch gracefully — ask which thread/issue the customer means rather than fabricating context. Per marina_agent.py:642-643, NEVER say 'I can't check emails' — instead ask for the email address used.

messages: [QA TEST] Just confirming this conversation is for testing , operator should be able to archive it from the dashboard without breaking state.
phase2Notes: Phase 2: after Marina replies, operator clicks Archive in the dashboard. Verify conversation_status flips to archived, conversation no longer surfaces in the active inbox view, but the row is preserved (not deleted).

messages: [QA TEST] Hola, quería saber si pueden ayudarme con un proyecto de automatización para mi negocio. Tengo una pequeña tienda en línea y quiero entender cómo funciona su servicio.
phase2Notes: Spanish multilingual. Marina MUST reply in Spanish per LANGUAGE RULE in marina_agent.py. Verify reply does not silently fall back to English.

messages: [QA TEST] CONGRATULATIONS! You've been selected for our exclusive crypto investment opportunity. Reply YES to claim 5000 USDT bonus today only!!!
phase2Notes: Spam/off-topic. Marina should briefly decline + redirect to legitimate topics (per marina_agent.py:679-681 hard-refusal rules). Should NOT engage with the spam content. Should NOT escalate (operator doesn't need to see every spam message).
